CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Application For Prove Up Hearing For Entry Of Court Judgment Or, Alternatively, Entry Of Court Judgment On The Papers
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Matthew Peck, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Russell Scalise, an individual, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Chris Morrow, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on March 16, 2017.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 29, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Russell Scalise, an individual, and against the Defaulted Defendant Chris Morrow, an individual, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $250,000.
Prejudgment Interest - $93,422.45.
Attorney Fees - $5,906.00.
Costs - $435.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $349,763.45.

Proposed judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Continued To Feb-21-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Application For Prove Up Hearing For Entry Of Court Judgment Or, Alternatively, Entry Of Court Judgment On The Papers
Off Calendar Nov-30-2017 Continued To Jan-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Matthew Peck, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Russell Scalise, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Chris Morrow, an individual
Default was entered against defendant Chris Morrow, an individual, on March 16, 2017.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 29, 2017.

Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to January 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. for further default prove-up hearing. Prior to the next calling of the case, plaintiff Russell Scalise shall file a supplemental declaration wherein his signature shall be notarized in the State of Illinois, where plaintiff currently resides.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Continued To Dec-27-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2017 Continued To Oct-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
